error.message: The fleet server session has expired.

input.userPrompt: Create a reusable Markdown syllabus for the internal distributed-systems course, with learning objectives, weekly modules, readings, labs, grading criteria, and an instructor checklist.
Visualize the new-employee experience as a Mermaid user-journey diagram, from offer acceptance through equipment setup, orientation, first assignment, and the 30-day check-in.
Open the finished electronic book artifact.
Use the laboratory server’s sample-tracking workspace.
Build a room-booking panel with building and capacity selects, start and end date-time pickers, amenity checkboxes, available-room cards, and Reserve and Clear buttons.

Create a bespoke procedural stained-glass artwork in self-contained HTML, with animated light refraction, pointer-driven lead lines, evolving color cells, and a gallery-style full-screen presentation.
Open the already deployed translation review portal at https://localization-review.example.net/jobs/482 and show that exact live surface without recreating it.
